query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `alert_history` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`alert_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`severity` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`metadata` json,
	`notification_sent` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`acknowledged_at` timestamp NULL,
	`acknowledged_by` int,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `alert_type_idx` (`alert_type`),
	INDEX `severity_idx` (`severity`),
	INDEX `created_at_idx` (`created_at`),
	INDEX `acknowledged_at_idx` (`acknowledged_at`)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `alert_history` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
	`alert_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`severity` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`metadata` json,
	`notification_sent` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`acknowledged_at` timestamp NULL,
	`acknowledged_by` int,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	INDEX `alert_type_idx` (`alert_type`),
	INDEX `severity_idx` (`severity`),
	INDEX `created_at_idx` (`created_at`),
	INDEX `acknowledged_at_idx` (`acknowledged_at`)
)
